lever: replace full A22 -= L21*L21^T GEMM update with lower-triangle-only SYRK update

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-p1vbf-reprofile cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(eig_48x48_f64|eigh_48x48_f64|cholesky_1024x1024_f64|qr_1024x1024_f64|pinv_192x192_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64|svd_48x48_f64|svd_48x48_full_f64|matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64)' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

proof.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-p1vbf28-proof cargo test -p fj-lax --lib cholesky -- --nocapture

after_same_worker.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-p1vbf28-after-ts1 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(cholesky_1024x1024_f64|cholesky_512x512_f64|cholesky_128x128_f64)' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

isomorphism.ordering: Small n < 256 scalar Cholesky path was unchanged. Candidate large blocked path computed each consumed lower-triangle Schur entry with t ascending over the same panel columns and skipped upper entries that future panels do not read and final output zeroes. Source was restored after the perf gate failed.
isomorphism.tie_breaking: No pivot selection or tie-breaking path exists in this Cholesky implementation.
isomorphism.floating_point: Candidate did not introduce fused multiply-add or mixed precision; large blocked Cholesky is already tolerance-validated rather than bit-identical. Proof was reconstruction plus scalar parity. Source is restored to the baseline GEMM update.

next_primitive: Do not retune lower-only scalar SYRK. Attack a different Cholesky primitive next: recursive/cache-oblivious Cholesky with packed panel solve plus a true register-tiled full Schur update, or a fused TRSM+GEMM update with explicit large-matrix tolerance proof. Target >=1.2x on linalg/cholesky_1024x1024_f64 or route to the next reprofiled linalg hotspot.
